## League R | 「 ✦ VOLT Guardian Owls ✦ 」 vs 「 ✦ PRAGMA CLAN ✦ 」
A match has dispute has been created by 「 ✦ PRAGMA CLAN ✦ 」 .
They are countering the decision of game 1 being auto forfeited.

The Evidence
- Screenshots of successful invite accepted messages at 21:40.

Statement from Sebii
After sitting down in Voice-Chat with both kejar and PⅠERON of 「 ✦ PRAGMA CLAN ✦ 」 , here are the arguments and evidence that was presented:
### Evidence
- The messages were edited at 21:41. (Shown in VC)
- Audit log of discord shows role being applied at 21:41.
### Arguments
- The wording of the rules invalidates the claim.
- Its not 「 ✦ PRAGMA CLAN ✦ 」 's fault that the bot is slow.
- They have earned the win.

My Statement:
The Wording of the rule can be contested in some way. However, during the match, the player was not registered during game 1. In this instance, the rule still applies even with the rule not being as clear as it could be. The fact remains that PⅠERON was not registered during game 1 of the match.
Yes, we have written out everything in a code-base which proves the situation wrong, but after some more thinking, the way we did it was actually incorrect.
The bot is not necessarily fast. However, you had more than enough time to make sure that you and your team were equipped to play the match under the correct circumstances. Just because it's a last minute decision, doesn't mean that you didn't play 50% of the match without the player that was not registered.
You might have earned the win on the field, however, you did not have the player registered after game 1, which means he is considered illegal for that match.
While i do agree the rule can be worded better, and i will adjust that after the season, the rule still has been breached definitively.

Next to that, i have also sat down with 𓆩⟬ ⋆⁺₊✧Askii✧₊⁺⋆⟭𓆪 👻 , who's writing this report and discussed this with the arguments that were presented by 「 ✦ PRAGMA CLAN ✦ 」 」 and he came to the decision that this should be penalized as well.

Official Decision
No action taken - Game 1 between 「 ✦ VOLT Guardian Owls ✦ 」 and 「 ✦ PRAGMA CLAN ✦ 」 will be auto forfeited by 「 ✦ PRAGMA CLAN ✦ 」 due to having an unregistered player in their roster during game 1.

ADJUSTMENTS POST REPORT
The whole match will be auto-forfeited by 「 ✦ PRAGMA CLAN ✦ 」 due to having an illegal player.
Adjustment: Due to bad instructions by Sebii ( Sebii instructing 「 ✦ PRAGMA CLAN ✦ 」 to use PⅠERON since he has been registered after game 2), Game 2's result will stay as carried out in-game. REMATCH Rivals cannot penalise 「 ✦ PRAGMA CLAN ✦ 」 in game 2, after 「 ✦ PRAGMA CLAN ✦ 」 have followed the instructions as provided by a Staff member. This turns into the following Game results:
- Game 1
Auto-Forfeit by 「 ✦ PRAGMA CLAN ✦ 」
- Game 2
Results stay as carried out in-game

Personal Statement from Sebii on the Adjustment of the Penalty
I'm extremely sorry for the confusion that was caused due to me mentioning that it was okay to use PⅠERON in game 2 of this match.
I hope you guys at 「 ✦ VOLT Guardian Owls ✦ 」 understand that i cannot penalise 「 ✦ PRAGMA CLAN ✦ 」 for following instructions that i have given. I will make sure to adjust the rules to how they are supposed to work after the season. You are supposed to be able to register players mid-match, as a way to have sudden dropouts not result in an auto-forfeit, but the rules currently do not reflect that.

Like i mentioned, Season 5 will have the rules adjusted and i will 1000% note that down myself, as it is a huge blunder, due to all the changes the rules are constantly getting. Match
If the Word “Match” is used, we talk about the Set.
In case of the League, one “match” is the combination of the home game and away game.
In case of a tournament, one “match” is the combination of games, making up the best of 3 set.
"

"If a Team has a not-registered player in a match, that team will be auto-forfeited for the games they've used that player in."

Match
If the Word “Match” is used, we talk about the Set.
In case of the League, one “match” is the combination of the home game and away game.
In case of a tournament, one “match” is the combination of games, making up the best of 3 set.
"where is part about GAME 1 and GAME 2, its only about match thereIf a Team has a not-registered player in a match, that team will be auto-forfeited for the games they've used that player in.And the fact is, in the match, you had a not-registered playerIf a Team has a not-registered player in a match, that team will be auto-forfeited for the games they've used that player in.HE WAS REGISTERED IN MATCHWho then got registeredPIERON in matchHE WAS REGISTERED IN MATCHHe was registered during the match, yes. However, due to a Staff member (me) instructing the use of PIERON being fine, the mistake now lays on REMATCH Rivals for game 2.
Which means if i would penalize your game 2, i would penalize you based on instructions that were wrong.

I cannot penalize you for something you were instructed to do.
So penalizing you for game 2 in this instance, is wrong, because i instructed you to play the game with the guy that wasn't registered.

The games stay the way as outline in the Match-Dispute report.
The second game was handled badly by me, due to my mistake from my side. I cannot penalize you for a mistake i've made.

I cannot instruct a team to break the rules and penalize them for it, and i wont.

Personal Statement from Sebii on the Adjustment of the Penalty
I'm extremely sorry for the confusion that was caused due to me mentioning that it was okay to use PⅠERON in game 2 of this match.
I hope you guys at 「 ✦ VOLT Guardian Owls ✦ 」 understand that i cannot penalise 「 ✦ PRAGMA CLAN ✦ 」 for following instructions that i have given. I will make sure to adjust the rules to how they are supposed to work after the season. You are supposed to be able to register players mid-match, as a way to have sudden dropouts not result in an auto-forfeit, but the rules currently do not reflect that.

Like i mentioned, Season 5 will have the rules adjusted and i will 1000% note that down myself, as it is a huge blunder, due to all the changes the rules are constantly getting. Yet again, i apologize.i think such a strict rules will create you a lot of tickets, but ok i understand - apart from the whole situation, because i see u interpreting rules for 2 ffs(and we got only 1), i dont think it is a good solution overall, either u need to add granulation or just completilety allow it, cuz u were talking about abuse of it, i dont think there is a field to abuse it with limited number of tokens.
as i said im not reffering to our case rn talking in general that i dont think its a good rule, not player friendlyi think such a strict rules will create you a lot of tickets, but ok i understand - apart from the whole situation, because i see u interpreting rules for 2 ffs(and we got only 1),...Like i mentioned above:
For Season 5 the rules will be adjusted to how they are actually meant.
In season 5 it will say that it will be looked at on a per-game instead of a per-match basis.
The problem here, is more with me interfering in the match. Sometimes, split decisions happen, and instead of instructing you in the use of Pieron being okay, i should've left it be, note it down and then penalize both matches afterwards.

The fact is, he was unregistered in the match and as per the rules i have to auto-forfeit you guys on all matches he was used. Unfortunate wording which will be changed in Season 5.

As for Pieron leaving the server:
I understand the frustration around this whole topic. I don't understand why, after he was so accepting in the conversation in Voice-Chat afterwards, he left the server in a more "raging" manner. But i'm not gonna hold the anger against him. If he rejoins the server within the next 24h i'm taking the administrative decision to add him back to your team, without the cost of a token.
